name: Chicken & Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cornbread mix according to package directions. Allow it to cool.
2. Crumble the baked cornbread.
3. Add eggs, chopped onion, celery, salt, and pepper to taste to the crumbled cornbread.
4. Stir in poultry seasoning and sage.
5. Fold in the cooked and deboned chickens.
6. Pour half of the chicken broth over the cornbread mixture.
7. Mix well.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 hours.
